mono.usage: Prices, PNL, order book data, timeframes, AI terminal logs

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid. High Density, Data Correlation, Scanability. Every pixel must be utilized. No empty floating spaces.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm to maintain a rigid, technical terminal look.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-border (zinc-800). No soft shadows. Use inner highlights if elevation is needed.

cards.style: Technical Grid style. Flat background (bg-zinc-950 or zinc-900), strict 1px border. No shadows.

buttons.primary: Solid #007AFF bg, sharp corners, bold uppercase text. Hover: lighter hue.
buttons.buy: Solid bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/50 hover:bg-emerald-500/30 font-bold tracking-wider
buttons.sell: Solid bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border border-red-500/50 hover:bg-red-500/30 font-bold tracking-wider
buttons.secondary: Transparent bg, 1px border border-zinc-700, text-zinc-300. Hover: bg-zinc-800.

tables.style: Dense (py-1 or py-2). Font-mono for numerical data. Right-aligned numbers, left-aligned text.

tabs.style: Underline or solid block style. Sharp corners. Active state bright white text, inactive dim gray.

ai_terminal.style: Retro-Futurism. Deep black background, text-zinc-400 or cyan-400 mono text. Typing effect. 1px border.

indicators_badges.active: bg-zinc-800 text-white border border-zinc-600 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono
indicators_badges.inactive: bg-transparent text-zinc-500 border border-zinc-800 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono

motion.transitions: Fast, precise. 150ms ease-out. No bouncy animations.
motion.data_updates: Price flash (bg-green-500/20 or bg-red-500/20 to transparent over 1000ms).

image_urls.description: Bitcoin/Crypto placeholder icon or background texture for onboarding
Abstract dark technical grid background. Use as an absolute position background with opacity-5 or 10 for the main dashboard to give it a tactical 'terminal' ambient feel.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Text over charts needs text-shadow or contrasting background.
accessibility.focus: Focus ring 2px solid Volt Blue (#007AFF) offset by 2px.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='buy-button', data-testid='pair-selector', data-testid='indicator-toggle-rsi').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a heavy, dense 'Control Room' dashboard (Archetype 2 - Performance Pro) optimized for crypto trading.

UI MUST be dark mode only. Use zinc-950 for body background and zinc-900 for widgets with a 1px solid zinc-800 border (No rounded corners or max rounded-sm). No soft shadows, rely on borders for definition.

Install and use 'lightweight-charts' (TradingView) for the main price chart if possible, OR build a very dense Recharts area with custom candlestick shapes if lightweight-charts is not feasible. The user requested 'interfaz de tradinview', so styling must mimic it (crosshair, price labels on Y-axis).
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, technical iconography, or lucide-react as fallback.

Layout structure (Bento Control Room grid-cols-12): Top Toolbar (Pair selector, API connection status). Left Column (col-span-2/3) for 'Panel de Señales de Trading' and 'Detección de Nuevos Lanzamientos'. Center (col-span-6/7) for Main Chart and 'Panel de Indicadores Técnicos' (toggles for RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, EMA/SMA, Stochastic, ATR, Volume Profile). Right Column (col-span-3) for Order Book and 'Panel de Trading (Auto/Semi-auto)'. Bottom Row (col-span-12) for 'Historial de Operaciones'.
Include an 'Análisis con IA' section using the ai_terminal style (Retro-Futurism). Use a typewriter effect and font-mono for the AI evaluating market moves.
Build a 'Panel de Trading' to switch between Auto and Semi-Auto modes, with inputs for risk, leverage, and amount. Mock the Binance API connection visually (Connected/Disconnected badge).
Build an 'Historial de Operaciones' in a dense table layout (font-mono for numerical data, text-xs).
Do NOT use standard Shadcn Card unless you strip out the rounded-xl and shadows. Override it with technical grid styling (rounded-none, border-zinc-800).
Apply data-testid to EVERY button, tab, input, and interactive row.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the generated abstract background for an empty state, login screen, or dashboard overlay with low opacity.
